name_en: Top-tier original version with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original version with full packaging
Small size denim in stock!!️
Groove 20 Boston Bag, an irresistible heart-mover. Simple shape, retro yet premium, crafted with a gradient denim effect. Exquisite yet full of fashion sense. Can be carried by hand or crossbody. Lightweight and convenient for personal use, with sufficient capacity for daily use.
size:20.5*13.5*12cm
